calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-20-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-18-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-08-2022 Continued To Jul-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-04-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. A certified copy of the will dated February 4, 2020 is admitted to probate. The original will was admitted to probate in New Mexico on October 20, 2020. Jane W. McGrath is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for September 20, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed before September 13, 2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. If not, an appearance will be required on that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: L. Maloney. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-21-2021 Continued To Aug-04-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
